22 Oct 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) conducted A/S exercises off Larne with ships from the 31st Escort Group.

The 31st Escort Group was made up of the corvettes HMS Berkeley Castle (Cdr. N.W. Duck, DSC and Bar, RD, RNR), HMS Dumbarton Castle (T/A/Lt.Cdr. P.F. Broadhead, RNR), HMS Hadleigh Castle (Lt. C. Sandeman, RN) and HMS Lancaster Castle (T/Lt. W.S. Joliffe, RNR). (57)
23 Oct 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) conducted A/S exercises off Larne with ships from of the 18th Escort Group.
The 18th Escort Group was made up of the frigates HMS Towy (Cdr. H.V. King, DSO, OBE, RN), HMS Balfour (Lt.Cdr.(Retd.) C.D.B. Coventry, RD, RNR) and HMS Hoste (Lt. P.J.H. Hoare, RN). (57)
25 Oct 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) conducted gunnery exercises off Larne.
These were to be followed by A/S exercises with aircraft but these were cancelled. (57)
26 Oct 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) conducted exercises off Larne with ships from the 1st Escort Group.

The 1st Escort Group was made up of the frigates HMS Affleck (Cdr.(Retd.) C. Gwinner, DSO and Bar, DSC, RN), HMS Bentley (Lt.Cdr. E.G. May, DSC, RN), HMS Capel (Lt. B.G. Heslop, DSC, RN), HMS Garlies ( T/A/Lt.Cdr. L.M.M. Stamp, RNVR) and HMS Gore (Lt. J.V. Reeves-Brown, DSC, RN) and HMS Whiteaker (Lt. G.P.W. Edwards, RN). (57)
27 Oct 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) conducted exercises off Larne with ships from the 1st Escort Group.

31 Oct 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) participated in A/S exercises off Larne with aircraft. (57)

3 Nov 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) participated in A/S exercises off Larne with aircraft. (58)
4 Nov 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) participated in A/S exercises off Larne with aircraft. (58)
6 Nov 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) conducted exercises off Larne with an Escort Group.

This was most likely with the 6th Escort Group which was at Larne at this time. This Escort Group was made up of the sloops HMS Wild Goose (A/Cdr. D.E.G. Wemyss, DSO, DSC and Bar, RN) and the frigates HMS Dominica (Lt.Cdr. H.N. Lawson, RD, RNR), HMS Labuan (T/A/Lt.Cdr. V.D.H. Bidwell, DSC, RNR), HMS Loch Fada (Lt.Cdr. B.A. Rogers, RD, RNR) en HMS Loch Ruthven (A/Lt.Cdr. R.T. Horan, RNR). (58)
7 Nov 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) participated in A/S exercises off Larne. (58)
8 Nov 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) participated in A/S exercises off Larne. Presumably these were with an escort group that was to protect a 'convoy'. (58)
9 Nov 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) participated in A/S exercises off Larne with aircraft. (58)
11 Nov 1944 At 0800 A/11, HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) departed Larne for Rothesay where she arrived at 1700 A/11.
From 0900 A/11 to shortly before noon, she was escorted by HMS ML 239 (T/Lt. O.H.W. Richards, RNVR). (58)
13 Nov 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) is docked at Holy Loch in AFD 7. (58)
15 Nov 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) is undocked. (58)
20 Nov 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) conducted D/F calibration trials off Rothesay. (58)

22 Nov 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) conducted a practice attack in the Clyde area on HMS Cyclops (Cdr. B. Bryant, DSO and 2 Bars, DSC, RN) which was escorted by HMS Bulldog (Lt.Cdr. C.G. Walker, RN). (58)
24 Nov 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) served as target for HMS Safari (Lt.Cdr.(Retd.) J.R.G. Harvey, RN) during exercises in the Clyde area. (58)
25 Nov 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) suffered a small fire in no.2 battery. (58)
26 Nov 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) conducted attack exercises in the Clyde area.
Most likely HMS Milford (Lt.Cdr. G.G. Slade, RN) and HMS Loch Craggie (T/A/Lt.Cdr. C.L.L. Davies, RNVR) acted as targets. (59)
28 Nov 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) conducted gunnery exercises in the Clyde area with a target that was towed by HMS Jan van Gelder (Lt. P.D. O'Driscoll, RNR). (58)
30 Nov 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) conducted D/G trials off Helensburgh.
Also the dummy snorkel fitted earlier was removed. (58)
2 Dec 1944 At 1230 A/2, HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) departed Rothesay for Campbeltown where she arrived at 1700 A/2. (60)
3 Dec 1944 At 0730 A/3, HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) departed Campbeltown for Douglas, Isle of Man where she arrived around 2100 A/3.
From 0800 A/3 to 1135 A/3, HMS Unrivalled proceeded in company with HMS Seadog (Lt. E.A. Hobson, DSC, RN) and HMS Shikari (Lt. E.H.U. Cautley, RNVR). (60)
5 Dec 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) departed Douglas, Isle of Man for exercises off Morecambe Bay with aircraft. (60)
7 Dec 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) returned to Douglas, Isle of Man. (60)
11 Dec 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) departed Douglas, Isle of Man for exercises with aircraft. She returned later the same day, the night exercises being cancelled. (60)
12 Dec 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) departed Douglas, Isle of Man for exercises off Morecambe Bay with aircraft. (60)
13 Dec 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) returned to Douglas, Isle of Man upon completion of the exercises. (60)
14 Dec 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) departed Douglas, Isle of Man for exercises off Morecambe Bay with aircraft. She however quickly returned due to a leak in the pressure hull. (60)

15 Dec 1944 Around 0800 A/15, HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) departed Douglas, Isle of Man for Rothesay where she arrived around 1850 A/15. She was escorted by HMS Bridgewater (Cdr.(Retd.) R.H. Mack, RN). (60)
16 Dec 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) proceeded from Rothesay to Holy Loch where she was docked in AFD 7 for repairs to her pressure hull. (60)
19 Dec 1944 With the repairs completed HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) was undocked at Holy Loch and immediately returned to Rothesay. (60)
20 Dec 1944 At 1000 A/20, HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) departed Rothesay to Campbeltown where she arrived at 1445 A/20. En-route diving trials were carried out. (60)
21 Dec 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) participated in A/S exercises off Campbeltown. (60)
22 Dec 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) participated in A/S exercises off Campbeltown. (60)
24 Dec 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) participated in A/S exercises off Campbeltown. (60)
26 Dec 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with, at least, HMS Shemara (Cdr.(Retd.) H. Buckle, RN) on which also a practice attack was made. (60)

28 Dec 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with, at least, HMS Inconstant (A/Lt.Cdr. H.D. Verschoyle, DSC, RN) on which also a practice attack was made. (60)
29 Dec 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS La Cordeliere (Lt.Cdr. A.J.G. Barff, RNR) and HMS Rhododendron (T/A/Lt.Cdr. H. Vernon, RNR).
Also a practice attack was made on HMS La Cordeliere (60)
31 Dec 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) participated in A/S exercises off Campbeltown. (60)
1 Jan 1945 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) participated in A/S exercises off Campbeltown. (61)
2 Jan 1945 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Spaniel (?) and HMS Rhododendron (T/A/Lt.Cdr. H. Vernon, RNR). (61)
3 Jan 1945 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS La Cordeliere (Lt.Cdr. A.J.G. Barff, RNR) and HMS Rhododendron (T/A/Lt.Cdr. H. Vernon, RNR). (61)
5 Jan 1945 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Shemara (Cdr.(Retd.) H. Buckle, RN) and HMS Spaniel (?). (61)
7 Jan 1945 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Shemara (Cdr.(Retd.) H. Buckle, RN) and HMS Spaniel (?). (61)
8 Jan 1945 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Spaniel (?) and HMS Boarhound (A/Ch.Skr. A. Keable, RNR). (61)
10 Jan 1945 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS La Cordeliere (Lt.Cdr. A.J.G. Barff, RNR) and HMS Rhododendron (T/A/Lt.Cdr. H. Vernon, RNR). (61)
11 Jan 1945 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS La Cordeliere (Lt.Cdr. A.J.G. Barff, RNR) and HMS Rhododendron (T/A/Lt.Cdr. H. Vernon, RNR). (61)
12 Jan 1945 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Shemara (Cdr.(Retd.) H. Buckle, RN) and HMS Radiant (T/A/Lt.Cdr. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR). (61)
14 Jan 1945 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Radiant (T/A/Lt.Cdr. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR). (61)
15 Jan 1945 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Radiant (T/A/Lt.Cdr. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR) and HMS Bedlington (Skr. A.W. Peak, RNR). (61)
24 Jan 1945 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS La Cordeliere (Lt.Cdr. A.J.G. Barff, RNR) and HMS L' Atlantique (Skr.Lt. C.W. Freer, RNR). (61)
27 Jan 1945 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) and HMS Una (Lt. F.E. Ashmead-Bartlett, RN) proceeded from Campbeltown to Rothesay. (61)

1 Feb 1945 Around 0845 A/1, HMS Una (Lt. F.E. Ashmead-Bartlett, RN), HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) and HMS Untiring (Lt. G.E.L.F. Edsell, RN) departed Rothesay for Plymouth. They were escorted by HMS Milford (Cdr.(Retd.) G.G. Slade, RN). (62)
3 Feb 1945 Around 1605 A/3, HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) arrived at Plymouth for repairs and refit at the Devonport Dockyard. (63)
6 Feb 1945 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) is docked in No.5 graving dock at the Devonport Dockyard. (64)
20 Mar 1945 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. R.P. Fitzgerald, DSC, RN) is undocked. (64)
13 Apr 1945 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. R.P. Fitzgerald, DSC, RN) is wiped (degaussed) at Plymouth. (65)
14 Apr 1945 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. R.P. Fitzgerald, DSC, RN) conducted post repair trials off Plymouth. Before the trials runs first the compass was adjusted. (65)
15 Apr 1945 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. R.P. Fitzgerald, DSC, RN) conducted D/F calibration trials off Plymouth. (65)
18 Apr 1945 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. R.P. Fitzgerald, DSC, RN) conducted exercises off Plymouth. (65)
23 Apr 1945 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. R.P. Fitzgerald, DSC, RN) was assigned to training duties while based at Plymouth. (65)
23 Apr 1945 Around 0900 B/23, HMS Unrivalled (Lt. R.P. Fitzgerald, DSC, RN) departed Plymouth for exercises with aircraft to the north of Brittany, France.
At 1640 B/23, HMS Unrivalled arrived in her exercises area. Her escort from Plymouth to the exercise area, HMS Pearl (T/Lt. B.G. Barfoot, RNVR), then parted company. (65)

27 Apr 1945 Around 1730 B/27, HMS Unrivalled (Lt. R.P. Fitzgerald, DSC, RN) returned to Plymouth. She was escorted to Plymouth by HMS Prospect (T/Lt. R.G.H. Plunket-Greene, RNVR) which had joined around 0915 B/27 coming from Morlaix, France. (66)
30 Apr 1945 Around 0915 B/30, HMS Unrivalled (Lt. R.P. Fitzgerald, DSC, RN) departed Plymouth for exercises with aircraft to the north of Brittany, France.
At 1645 B/23, HMS Unrivalled arrived in her exercises area. Her escort from Plymouth to the exercise area, HMS Pearl (T/Lt. B.G. Barfoot, RNVR), then parted company. (65)
4 May 1945 Around 1615 A/4, HMS Unrivalled (Lt. R.P. Fitzgerald, DSC, RN) returned to Plymouth from exercises.

She was escorted back to Plymouth by HMS Ulva (T/A/Skr.Lt. A.N. Mace, RNR) which had joined around 0820 A/4 having departed Plymouth around 0200 A/4 for the rendezvous position in 49°12'N, 04°20'W at 0900 A/4. (67)
7 May 1945 Around 1000 B/7, HMS Unrivalled (Lt. R.P. Fitzgerald, DSC, RN) departed Plymouth for exercises with aircraft to the north of Brittany, France.
She was escorted until around 1830 B/7 by HMS Ruby (T/Lt. C.F. Unwin, RNVR) on which a practice attack was made when the submarine arrived in her exercise area. (68)
9 May 1945 Around 0030 B/9, HMS Unrivalled (Lt. R.P. Fitzgerald, DSC, RN) returned to Plymouth after the exercises had been cancelled the previous day.

She was escorted back to Plymouth by HMS Ulva (T/A/Skr.Lt. A.N. Mace, RNR) which had joined around 1845 A/9 having departed Plymouth earlier in the day for the rendezvous position in 49°12'N, 04°20'W at 1900 A/9. (68)
15 May 1945 Around 0900 B/15, HMS Unrivalled (Lt. R.P. Fitzgerald, DSC, RN) departed Plymouth for exercises with aircraft to the north of Brittany, France. (68)
19 May 1945 Around 1300 B/19, HMS Unrivalled (Lt. R.P. Fitzgerald, DSC, RN) returned to Plymouth. An escort [not identified] had joined around 0600 B/19. (68)

21 May 1945 Around 0900 B/21, HMS Unrivalled (Lt. R.P. Fitzgerald, DSC, RN) departed Plymouth for exercises with aircraft to the north of Brittany, France. She was escorted until around 1800 B/21 by HMS Prospect (T/Lt. R.G.H. Plunket-Greene, RNVR). Before they parted company the submarine made a practive attack on the trawler. (68)
